headline: ITC Probe Puts Joby Delta Partnership And US eVTOL Plans At Risk
summary: Delta Air Lines has warned that a US International Trade Commission investigation into Joby Aviation could threaten their eVTOL partnership. The probe centers on Archer Aviation’s patent infringement allegations against Joby and could result in Joby’s aircraft being removed from the US market. The investigation introduces an additional layer of legal and regulatory risk for Joby Aviation’s commercialization plans. For investors tracking Joby Aviation (NYSE:JOBY), this ITC case lands at a...

headline: Assessing Delta Air Lines (DAL) Valuation As Conflicting Fair Value Narratives Emerge
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$71.20. Readers are weighing this valuation against the company’s scale, profitability, and recent return profile. See our latest analysis for Delta Air Lines. Despite a recent 1-day share price return that fell 2.9%, Delta’s 1-month share price return of 4.98% and 1-year total shareholder return of 40.93% point to momentum that has cooled slightly after a strong multi year run...
